glosses.ja: 宣言する; 表明する

sentences.target: Je déclare mes impôts en ligne.

translations.fr: Je déclare mes impôts en ligne.
translations.es: Presento la declaración de impuestos por internet.
translations.de: Ich reiche meine Steuererklärung online ein.
translations.it: Presento la dichiarazione dei redditi online.
translations.pt: Eu entrego a declaração de impostos online.
translations.he: אני מגיש את דוח המס באינטרנט.
translations.hi: मैं अपने कर ऑनलाइन दाखिल करता हूँ.
translations.el: Υποβάλλω τη φορολογική μου δήλωση διαδικτυακά.
translations.nb: Jeg leverer skattemeldingen min på nett.
translations.id: Saya melaporkan pajak saya secara online.
translations.sv: Jag lämnar in min deklaration online.
translations.ja: 私はオンラインで確定申告をします。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular; subject of the clause.
Main lexical verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive, selects a direct object ('mes impôts').
Possessive determiner, 1st person singular, plural form; modifies 'impôts' and agrees in number.
Common noun, masculine plural; direct object of 'déclare'.
Preposition introducing 'ligne'; part of the fixed expression 'en ligne' functioning as an adverbial modifier ('online').
Common noun; object of the preposition 'en' in the expression 'en ligne', forming an adverbial complement.

sentences.target: Vous devez déclarer un bagage perdu.

translations.fr: Vous devez déclarer un bagage perdu.
translations.en: You must report a lost bag.
translations.es: Debe informar de la pérdida de una maleta.
translations.de: Sie müssen ein verlorenes Gepäckstück melden.
translations.ru: Вы должны сообщить о потерянном багаже.
translations.pt: Você deve comunicar o extravio de uma bagagem.
translations.vi: Bạn phải báo cáo hành lý thất lạc.
translations.ar: يجب عليك الإبلاغ عن حقيبة مفقودة.
translations.nl: U moet een verloren koffer melden.
translations.uk: Ви повинні повідомити про загублений багаж.
translations.hu: Be kell jelentenie egy elveszett csomagot.
translations.hi: आपको एक खोए हुए बैग की रिपोर्ट करनी होगी.
translations.el: Πρέπει να δηλώσετε μια χαμένη βαλίτσα.
translations.nb: Du må melde fra om tapt bagasje.
translations.id: Anda harus melaporkan tas yang hilang.
translations.sv: Du måste anmäla en förlorad väska.
translations.ro: Trebuie să raportați un bagaj pierdut.
translations.ja: あなたは紛失した荷物を届け出なければなりません。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person plural (also used as formal singular); subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative, 2nd person plural; expresses obligation and selects the infinitive 'déclarer'.
Main lexical verb in the infinitive; complement of the modal 'devez'.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; introduces 'bagage'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'déclarer'.
Adjective (past participle used adjectivally), masculine singular; modifies 'bagage'.

sentences.target: On déclare un accident à l'assurance.

translations.fr: On déclare un accident à l'assurance.
translations.en: We report an accident to the insurer.
translations.es: Comunicamos un accidente a la aseguradora.
translations.de: Wir melden einen Unfall bei der Versicherung.
translations.ru: Мы сообщаем о аварии в страховую компанию.
translations.pt: Nós comunicamos um acidente à seguradora.
translations.he: אנחנו מדווחים על תאונה לחברת הביטוח.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi báo cáo tai nạn cho công ty bảo hiểm.
translations.nl: We melden een ongeluk bij de verzekeraar.
translations.uk: Ми повідомляємо про ДТП страховій компанії.
translations.hi: हम बीमा कंपनी को दुर्घटना की सूचना देते हैं.
translations.el: Δηλώνουμε ένα ατύχημα στην ασφαλιστική εταιρεία.
translations.nb: Vi melder en ulykke til forsikringsselskapet.
translations.id: Kami melaporkan kecelakaan kepada perusahaan asuransi.
translations.sv: Vi anmäler en olycka till försäkringsbolaget.
translations.da: Vi anmelder en ulykke til forsikringsselskabet.
translations.ja: 私たちは事故を保険会社に報告します。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/personal subject pronoun; triggers 3rd person singular agreement on the verb.
Main lexical verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular (agreeing with 'On'); transitive.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; introduces 'accident'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'déclare'.
Preposition introducing an indirect object/recipient.
Common noun (feminine singular) with elided definite article 'l'' (= le/la); object of 'à', denoting the insurance company/institution.

sentences.target: Ils déclarent la naissance à la mairie.
sentences.reading: /il deklaʁ la nɛsɑ̃s a la meʁi/

translations.fr: Ils déclarent la naissance à la mairie.
translations.ipa: /il deklaʁ la nɛsɑ̃s a la meʁi/
translations.en: They register the birth at city hall.
translations.es: Registran el nacimiento en el ayuntamiento.
translations.de: Sie melden die Geburt im Rathaus.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们在市政厅登记出生。
translations.yue: 佢哋喺市政廳登記出生。
translations.pt: Eles registram o nascimento na prefeitura.
translations.vi: Họ đăng ký khai sinh tại tòa thị chính.
translations.nl: Zij geven de geboorte aan op het stadhuis.
translations.uk: Вони реєструють народження в міській раді.
translations.hi: वे नगर निगम में जन्म का पंजीकरण करते हैं.
translations.id: Mereka mendaftarkan kelahiran di balai kota.
translations.ja: 彼らは市役所で出生を登録します。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 3rd person plural; subject of the clause.
Main lexical verb, present indicative, 3rd person plural; transitive, takes 'la naissance' as direct object.
Definite article, feminine singular; introduces 'naissance'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'déclarent'.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article, feminine singular; introduces 'mairie'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'à' (location where the declaration is made).

en: You must report a lost bag.
We report an accident to the insurer.
They register the birth at city hall.
